name: Bertelsmann SE & Co. KGaA GENUS
summary: Bertelsmann SE & Co. KGaA is a German multinational conglomerate with core businesses in media, services, and education. The company operates through divisions including RTL Group (broadcasting), Penguin Random House (publishing), Gruner + Jahr (magazines), BMG (music), Arvato (services), and Bertelsmann Education Group. Bertelsmann is headquartered in Gütersloh, Germany.
